title: Wubble Super Bubble Ball - Blue | Looks Like a Bubble, Plays Like a Ball! | Inflates to 80cm Tall | Pump not Included | Outdoor Garden Toys | Ages 6+
features: Looks like a bubble, plays like a ball
Super Wubble is squishy, squashy, super soft and lightweight and can be inflated up to 80 cm tall
Needs to be pumped up using electric pump (not included)
Instructions and care information is on the pack, and product inner bag label, as well as instruction videos online
description: From the manufacturer Like no ball you've ever played with before! it's super squishy and stretchy. It looks like a bubble but plays like a ball. The amazing W ubble Bubble Ball is unlike anything you've ever seen! It looks like a bubble, moves like a bubble, but won't pop like a bubble! Kick it, throw it, bounce it or even sit on it – it's squishy, soft yet super strong! A great gift for ages six and up. Please note: pump is not included. Features Takes approximately 2 minutes to inflate. Repair kit. Folds flat for storage Size inflated H80, W80, D8cm. Weight 330g. Made of elastomer. Maximum user weight 50kg. Suitable for outdoor and indoor use. How To Use Wubble Bubble Ball Wubble Bubble Ball comes deflated with its own battery operated pump (can buy without pump). To use your Wubble Bubble Ball, use the adaptor to fill with air; remove before it gets to 36 inches – more detailed instructions are included with your purchase. Then you can play with your Wubble Bubble Ball indoors or out, at the beach or in the yard, all year round. It will bounce, make funny sounds when you hit it, and it will not pop (unless of course you poke it with something sharp). When playtime is over, to deflate your Wubble Bubble Ball for storage and so it lasts longer.
